docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-11-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,633.75 [FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST] FILED BY STRICKBERGER, NEAL AS TO DEFENDANT AIR CANADA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED JUN-01-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIR CANADA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO DEC-11-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO SEP-11-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NOTIFIED BY PHONE. CALLED DEFENDANT'S PHONE NUMBER ON FILE BUT IT'S AN AUTOMATED SYSTEM AND UNABLE TO REACH A PERSON TO SPEAK TO. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED AUG-10-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AIR CANADA
